scope_boundary: Clinical decision-support and claims-operations AI systems deployed at Contoso Health Insurance. Excludes corporate IT and HR-facing AI systems.
reviewed_by: AI Governance Lead, Contoso Health Insurance

ai_system_inventory.purpose: Triage inbound health insurance claims to prioritize high-urgency clinical cases for human adjuster review. Does not approve, deny, or adjust claim amounts.
Rank in-network provider search results for members by likely relevance. Non-determinative of coverage.

A.2.3.justification: AI policy is an annex of the enterprise information-security policy; cross-references reviewed 2026-Q1.

A.4.5.justification: Organization is a deployer, not a provider, for both inventoried AI systems. Supplier-facing Annex A controls addressed via vendor-management track.

A.9.2.justification: Monitoring dashboard proposal exists; implementation scheduled for 2026-Q2 completion.

exclusion_justifications.A.10.2: Third-party provider contracts handled under enterprise vendor-management policy; control formally out of AIMS scope.
